summary: Frontend-only testing completed successfully. All 4 pages tested: WalletPage, AdminRequests, AdminTemplates, AdminPortfolios. All UI components, dialogs, forms, and navigation working correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend pages tested and working. WalletPage shows balance cards, deposit/withdrawal dialogs with broker selection. AdminRequests shows pending requests with approve/reject functionality. AdminTemplates allows CRUD operations on contract templates with preview. AdminPortfolios has 4-tab form with template selection and duration unit options.

Withdrawal button with dialog (broker dropdown, account input)
